info.title: TUF API
info.description: API documentation for The Universal Forums (TUF)

post.description: Authenticate with email/username and password; returns session cookies
Create a new user account
Verify email address using token from verification email
Send a new verification email to the current user
Change authenticated user email and send a new verification email
Handles OAuth provider callback (used by provider redirect).

get.description: Returns OAuth-linked profile for current user
Redirects to provider to link account (browser flow).

post.description: Complete linking after provider callback
Remove OAuth provider from account

get.description: Returns the authenticated user profile with player and OAuth providers

put.description: Update username, nickname, or country for the current user
Update password for the authenticated user

post.description: Multipart: field `avatar` (image). Optional `avatarMode`: `static` (default) = cropped/processed upload (JPEG or GIF, e.g. client-cropped animated GIF); `animated` = raw GIF only, no client-side crop.

requestBody.description: Multipart form: avatar (file), avatarMode (optional: static | animated)

delete.description: Remove the current user profile avatar

patch.summary: Update player profile header card surface style

post.summary: Upload player profile header surface background image

delete.summary: Remove player profile header surface background image

post.description: Schedules account deletion with a 3-day grace period. Immediately hides the player from the leaderboard.
Cancels a scheduled account deletion and restores permission flags and leaderboard ban state safely.
Send password reset email to the given email address
Set new password using the token from the reset email
Issue new tokens using a valid refresh cookie
Invalidate current session and clear auth cookies

get.description: Get all sessions for the current user

delete.description: Revoke a specific session by id

get.description: List ratings with null confirmedAt (pending confirmation). Cached; invalidated on rating updates.

put.description: Submit or update rating detail. Body: rating, comment?, isCommunityRating?. Verified; rater for non-community.

delete.description: Remove a user's rating detail. Rater (own) or super admin.

get.description: List all level submissions. Super admin.
List pending level submissions with full includes. Super admin.
List all pass submissions. Super admin.
List pending pass submissions with includes. Super admin.

put.description: Approve pending level submission; creates level and rating. Super admin.
Decline pending level submission. Super admin.
Approve pending pass submission; creates pass. Super admin.
Decline pending pass submission. Super admin.
Update levelId, speed, judgements, keyCount, and/or flags on a pending pass submission. Omitted nested keys are unchanged. keyCount syncs is12K/is16K flags. Super admin.

requestBody.description: Partial fields: levelId (number), speed (number), keyCount (number|null), judgements (partial object), flags (partial object). At least one required.

put.description: Assign a player to a pending pass submission. Body: playerId. Super admin.

post.description: Approve all pending pass submissions that have an assigned player. Super admin.

put.description: Update creator requests and team request data for a submission. Body: creatorRequests?, teamRequestData?.
Assign existing creator to a creator request. Body: creatorId, role, creditRequestId. Super admin.

post.description: Create creator/team and assign to submission. Body: name, aliases?, role, creditRequestId.
Add a new creator/team request to submission. Body: role.

delete.description: Remove a creator or team request from submission.

put.description: Set or create song request for level submission. Body: songId?, isNewRequest?, songName?, verificationState?. Super admin.
Update or add artist request. Body: artistId?, artistRequestId?, isNewRequest?, artistName?, verificationState?. Super admin.

post.description: Upload evidence images (up to 10). Body: type (song|artist), requestId?. Super admin.

get.description: Get evidence for a level submission. Super admin.

delete.description: Delete evidence image by id. Super admin.

put.description: Assign existing song to submission; replaces artist requests with song credits. Body: songId. Super admin.
Add existing artist to submission. Body: artistId. Super admin.

post.description: Create or find song and assign to submission. Body: name, aliases?, songRequestId?. Super admin.
Create or find artist and add to submission. Body: name, aliases?, artistRequestId?. Super admin.
Add new song request placeholder to submission. Body: verificationState?. Super admin.
Add new artist request placeholder. Body: verificationState?. Super admin.

delete.description: Remove artist request from submission. Super admin.

put.description: Update suffix field. Body: suffix. Super admin.

head.description: Validate MySQL backup upload credentials. Super admin password.

post.description: Upload MySQL backup file. Multipart: backup. Super admin password.
Trigger manual MySQL backup. Body: type?. Super admin password.

get.description: List available MySQL backups. Super admin.

post.description: Restore MySQL backup by filename. Super admin password.

delete.description: Delete MySQL backup file. Super admin password.

post.description: Rename MySQL backup file. Body: newName. Super admin password.

get.description: Stream MySQL backup file download. Super admin password.
List all users with rater or super admin role.
List all users with rater or super admin role. Super admin.
List all users with curator or head curator role.

post.description: Grant a role (rater/superadmin/curator/headcurator) to a user by username. Body: username, role.
Revoke a role (rater/superadmin/curator/headcurator) from a user. Body: userId or username, role.
Sync Discord usernames for all users with Discord provider. Super admin.

patch.description: Set or clear rating ban for a player. Body: isRatingBanned (boolean). Super admin.

get.description: Get rater/super admin flags for a user by Discord ID.
Get user by Discord ID. Super admin.

post.summary: Schedule account deletion for a user
post.description: Same grace-period flow as self-service deletion. Optional body.deletionIncludeCreator strips chart credits, soft-deletes solo levels, and removes the linked creator profile when the job runs.

get.description: Pending level/pass submission counts. Rater auth. Cached.
Ratings per rater in date range. Query: startDate, endDate, date, page, offset, limit. Cached.
Paginated audit logs. Query: userId, action, method, route, startDate, endDate, q, page, pageSize, sort, order. Super admin.
List all curation types ordered by sortOrder and name.

post.description: Create a curation type. Body: name, color?, abilities?. Super admin password.

put.description: Update curation type by id. Body: name?, color?, abilities?. Super admin password.

delete.description: Delete curation type and cascade delete related curations. Super admin password.

post.description: Upload icon for curation type. Super admin password.

delete.description: Remove icon from curation type. Super admin password.

put.description: Body: sortOrders (array of { id, sortOrder }). Super admin password.

put.summary: Update curation type group sort orders
put.description: Body: groups[{ name, sortOrder }]. Super admin password.

get.description: Paginated curations. Query: typeId/typeIds (row filter OR), mustHaveTypeIds (level must have ALL), excludeTypeIds (level must have NONE), groupByLevel, search, excludeIds. Optional facetQuery (JSON v1, curationTypes only; tags not supported).

post.description: Create curation for a level. Body: levelId. Curator or rater.

put.summary: Bulk sync curations for a level
put.description: Body: { shortDescription?, description?, customCSS?, customColor?, typeIds: number[] }. One curation per level; typeIds replaces linked types.
Update curation. Body: shortDescription?, description?, customCSS?, customColor?, typeIds?. Requires curation permission.

get.description: Get single curation by id.

delete.description: Delete curation. Requires curation management permission.

get.description: Get schedules for a week. Query: weekStart (optional).

post.description: Schedule a curation for a week. Body: curationId, weekStart, listType (primary|secondary). Head curator.

put.description: Update schedule. Body: isActive?. Head curator.

delete.description: Delete schedule. Head curator.

post.description: Upload thumbnail for curation. Requires curation management permission.

delete.description: Remove thumbnail from curation. Requires curation management permission.

get.description: List all Discord guilds with roles. Super admin.

post.description: Create guild. Body: guildId, name, botToken, isActive?. Super admin password.

get.description: Get single guild with roles. Super admin.

put.description: Update guild. Body: guildId, name, botToken?, isActive?. Super admin password.

delete.description: Delete guild and its roles. Super admin password.

get.description: List Discord sync roles for a guild. Super admin.

post.description: Create sync role. Body: roleId, label, type (DIFFICULTY|CURATION), minDifficultyId?, curationTypeId?, etc. Super admin password.

requestBody.description: roleId, label, type, minDifficultyId, curationTypeId, conflictGroup, isActive, sortOrder

put.description: Update sync role. Super admin password.

requestBody.description: roleId, label, type, minDifficultyId, curationTypeId, conflictGroup, isActive, sortOrder

delete.description: Delete sync role. Super admin password.

put.description: Body: roleIds (array of role IDs in desired order). Super admin password.

post.description: Manually trigger Discord role sync for a user. Super admin.
Trigger difficulty role sync for a player. Super admin.
Trigger curation role sync for a creator. Super admin.

delete.description: Removes team memberships and aliases, strips credits, soft-deletes solo levels (chart files preserved), deletes CDN banner, and destroys the creator row. Query unlinkOnly=1 only clears user linkage (users.creatorId and creators.userId).

head.description: Returns 200 if level exists and user may access; 403/404 otherwise. No body.

put.description: Full level update by super admin (scores, difficulty, metadata, etc.).

delete.description: Soft delete a level (super admin).

get.description: Fetch level by ID with full details (cached)
Returns all song/artist aliases for a level

schema.description: List of aliases for the level

post.description: Add song/artist alias for a level; optionally propagate to other levels

put.description: Update an existing alias by levelId and aliasId

delete.description: Remove an alias by levelId and aliasId

get.description: Count levels that would be affected when propagating an alias

put.description: Update level metadata (song, artist, links, etc.) when user owns the level.

requestBody.description: song, artist, videoLink, dlLink, suffix, workshopLink, songId

delete.description: Hard-delete a soft-deleted level (super admin only). Removes CDN level zip and curation preview assets, destroys the row and dependent data, and deletes the Elasticsearch document.

400.description: Level is not soft-deleted or invalid request

patch.description: Restore a soft-deleted level (super admin).
Toggle hidden status (creator or super admin).

patch.summary: Update level xacc score curve meta
patch.description: Super admin only. Sets per-level xacc curve meta (including saved pin positions). null clears to site defaults. Recalculates all passes on the level.

requestBody.description: xaccCurveMeta object (or null to clear to defaults)

patch.description: Super admin only. Sets bpm, tilecount, and/or levelLengthInMs for levels whose download is not CDN-managed. CDN levels must use chart sync from the uploaded file.

requestBody.description: At least one of bpm, tilecount, levelLengthInMs (null clears)

put.description: Like or unlike a level (action: "like" | "unlike").

post.description: Re-run auto tag assignment for a level (super admin).

get.description: Pending NEW queue rows (super admin)
Pending RERATE queue rows (super admin)
Search levels with filters (query, pguRange, sort, tags, etc.). Optional facetQuery (JSON v1) replaces tagsFilter and curatedTypesFilter name lists when present. Query: page, offset, limit.

parameters.name: byCreatorId
parameters.description: Filter to levels credited to this creator id

get.description: Fetch a single level by numeric ID (cached)

head.description: HEAD request to check if level exists (no body)

get.summary: Get LEVELZIP CDN metadata by file ID
get.description: Returns normalized LEVELZIP metadata for a CDN `fileId` (same shape as GET /levels/:id/cdnData metadata). Requires a logged-in user.
Returns CDN-related data for a level
Returns whether the current user has liked the level
Returns ratings for a level
Returns the level chart file content
List level packs with optional search, filters, and pagination. Query: page, offset, limit, query, viewMode, pinned, myLikesOnly, sort, order. Cached.

post.description: Create a new level pack. Name required; viewMode, iconUrl, cssFlags, isPinned optional.

get.description: Get current user's favorited packs.

Per-level CDN zip size, original filename, and **trimmed** LEVELZIP metadata for third-party tooling: `targetLevelRelativePath`, `levelFiles` (array of name/relativePath/songFilename/size), `songFiles` (array of { name, size }). Cached separately from the pack tree.
Get a pack by ID or link code with optional tree. Uses stacked Redis layers (structure vs ES level payloads) inside the handler — not monolithic route Cache.

put.description: Update pack name, viewMode, cssFlags, isPinned (admin for some fields).

delete.description: Delete a pack. Owner or admin.

post.description: Generate a CDN download link (zip) for a pack or folder.
Upload pack icon (JPEG/PNG/WebP, max 5MB).

delete.description: Remove pack icon from CDN.

post.description: Check which level IDs can be added to a pack at a given parent. Returns valid and invalid IDs with reasons.
Add folder(s) or level(s) to a pack. type, name/levelIds, parentId, sortOrder.

put.description: Update pack item (e.g. folder name).

delete.description: Remove a folder or level from a pack.

put.description: Update full pack tree (items array with id, parentId, sortOrder, children).

get.description: Search users by username/nickname for pack transfer. Super admin only.

put.description: Transfer pack to another user. Super admin only.

get.description: Check if current user has favorited the pack.

put.description: Set or clear pack favorite (favorited: boolean).
Update parentId/sortOrder for multiple items. Body: items: [{ id, parentId?, sortOrder? }].

requestBody.description: items: array of { id, parentId?, sortOrder? }

get.description: List passes that are not yet announced (isAnnounced: false, non-deleted, non-deleted level, ranked difficulty). Super admin only.

put.description: Update a pass by ID (super admin). Body: levelId, vidUploadTime, speed, feelingRating, vidTitle, videoLink, is12K, is16K, isNoHoldTap, accuracy, scoreV2, isDeleted, judgements, playerId, isAnnounced, isDuplicate, isAdofaiV2. Recalculates accuracy/score when judgements provided.

delete.description: Soft-delete a pass by ID (super admin). Sets isDeleted = true; world's first and player stats are updated.

get.description: Fetch pass by ID with full details via PlayerStatsService. Returns 404 for missing or hidden (non-owner).

patch.description: Restore a soft-deleted pass by ID (super admin). Sets isDeleted = false; world's first and player stats updated.
Toggle isHidden for a pass. Caller must own the pass (same playerId as authenticated user).
Update feelingRating for a pass. Caller must own the pass (same playerId as authenticated user). feelingRating is required and must be a valid rating string.

get.description: Fetch a single pass by numeric ID with player, level, and judgements. Super admins see deleted passes.

200.description: Pass with count and results array

get.description: List all non-deleted passes for a level with players and judgements. Hidden passes visible only to owner or super admin.
Search passes with filters (query, deletedFilter, minDiff, maxDiff, keyFlag, levelId, player, specialDifficulties, sort). Query: page, offset, limit. Uses Elasticsearch.
Get leaderboard-style player list (Elasticsearch-backed). Prefer `/v3/players/leaderboard` for new integrations.
Get player by ID with stats and profile. Auth adds extra fields.
Search players by name (player name or username). Exact name/username matches are returned first, then prefix matches, then substring matches. Query: limit (default 30, max 100), offset (default 0).

post.description: Create a new player. Body: name. Super admin.

put.description: Update player display name. Super admin.
Full replacement of searchable player aliases (max 20). Super admin.
Update player country code (2 chars). Super admin.

patch.description: Set player ban status. Body: isBanned. Super admin.
Set player submissions paused. Body: isSubmissionsPaused. Super admin.

post.description: Merge source player into target. Body: targetPlayerId. Super admin.
Create player profile request. Body: name, discordId, country.

get.description: Get user/player/creator and role data by Discord ID (e.g. for bot).
Paginated player leaderboard backed by Elasticsearch. Legacy response shape preserved for v2 clients; prefer `/v3/players/leaderboard` for new integrations.
Get current hash of difficulties (for cache busting).
List announcement channels. Super admin password.

post.description: Create announcement channel. Body: webhookUrl, label. Super admin password.

put.description: Update announcement channel. Body: webhookUrl, label. Super admin password.

delete.description: Soft-delete announcement channel. Super admin password.

get.description: List announcement roles. Super admin password.

post.description: Create announcement role. Body: roleId, label, messageFormat?. Super admin password.

put.description: Update announcement role. Body: roleId, label, messageFormat?. Super admin password.

delete.description: Soft-delete announcement role. Super admin password.

get.description: Get announcement directives for a difficulty. Super admin password.

post.description: Replace announcement directives for a difficulty. Body: directives[]. Super admin password.

put.description: Bulk update tag sort orders. Body: sortOrders[{ id, sortOrder }]. Super admin password.
Bulk update tag group sort orders. Body: groups[{ name, sortOrder }]. Super admin password.

get.description: Get all level tags (ordered by group and sort order).

post.description: Create level tag. Body: name, color, icon?, group?. Multipart: icon. Super admin password.

put.description: Update level tag. Body: name?, color?, icon?, group?. Multipart: icon. Super admin password.

delete.description: Delete level tag and its assignments. Super admin password.

get.description: Get tags assigned to a level.

post.description: Replace tags assigned to a level. Body: tagIds[]. Super admin.

get.description: Get all difficulties (for cache/list).

post.description: Create a difficulty. Body: id?, name, type, icon?, emoji?, color?, baseScore?, legacy?, legacyIcon?, legacyEmoji?. Multipart: icon, legacyIcon. Super admin password.

requestBody.description: id, name, type, icon, emoji, color, baseScore, legacy, legacyIcon, legacyEmoji

put.description: Bulk update difficulty sort orders. Body: sortOrders[{ id, sortOrder }]. Super admin password.

post.description: Upload icon for a difficulty. Multipart: icon file. Super admin password.
Upload legacy icon for a difficulty. Multipart: icon file. Super admin password.

put.description: Update a difficulty. Body: name?, type?, icon?, emoji?, color?, baseScore?, sortOrder?, legacy?, legacyIcon?, legacyEmoji?. Multipart: icon, legacyIcon. Super admin password.

requestBody.description: name, type, icon, emoji, color, baseScore, sortOrder, legacy, legacyIcon, legacyEmoji

delete.description: Mark difficulty as LEGACY and migrate levels to fallback. Query: fallbackId. Super admin password.

get.description: Returns references grouped by PGU difficulty (cached).

post.description: Create a difficulty reference level (super admin).

get.description: Returns reference levels for a difficulty (cached).
Returns references (difficulty links) for a level (cached).

put.description: Update a reference by ID (super admin).

delete.description: Delete a reference by ID (super admin).

put.description: Replace references for a difficulty with the given list (super admin).

get.description: Returns overview stats: total levels, passes, players, difficulties, submissions. Cached; invalidated via tags `levels:all` and `Passes` (same as level/pass HTTP caches). Pending submission counts may lag until TTL.
Returns player stats: by country, top players by passes. Cached; invalidated via `levels:all` and `Passes` from level/pass hooks.
Paginated creators with search. Query: page, offset, limit, search, verificationStatus, excludeAliases, sort.

post.description: Create a creator. Body: name, aliases?.

get.description: Get creator with credits and aliases.
Get team with members, levels, and aliases.
Paginated levels with creator/team audit. Query: page, offset, limit, search, excludeAliases.

put.description: Replace creators for a level. Body: creators[{ id, role, isOwner }]. Super admin.

post.description: Merge source creator into target. Body: sourceId, targetId. Super admin.
Split creator into multiple creators. Body: creatorId, newNames[], roles?. Super admin.

put.description: Update creator. Body: name?, aliases?, userId?, verificationStatus?.

get.description: List teams with optional search. Query: search.

post.description: Create team. Body: name, aliases?, description?. Super admin.

put.description: Create/update team for level. Body: teamId?, name?, members?. Super admin.

delete.description: Remove team association from level. Super admin.
Delete team or remove from level. Query: levelId. Super admin.

get.description: Get team by ID with members and aliases.

put.description: Link user to creator (Discord account). Super admin.

delete.description: Unlink user from creator. Super admin.

put.description: Assign creator to user or player. Params: userOrPlayerId (UUID or playerId), creatorId. Super admin.

delete.description: Remove creator from user or player. Params: userOrPlayerId (UUID or playerId). Super admin.

get.description: Search creators by name (URI-encoded).

put.description: Update team. Body: name?, aliases?, description?. Super admin.

delete.description: Delete team if not assigned to any levels. Super admin.

get.description: Search teams by name.
Paginated, searchable list of artists. Query: page, offset, limit, search, sort.
Returns artist details by ID
Paginated, searchable song list. Query: page, offset, limit, search, artistId, sort, verificationState.

post.description: Create a song. Body: name, verificationState?, aliases?. Super admin.

get.description: Level count and suffix distribution for a song. Super admin.
Get song by ID with aliases, links, evidences, credits, and levels.

put.description: Update song name, verificationState, extraInfo. Super admin.

delete.description: Delete song if not used by any level. Super admin.

get.description: Get evidence images/links for a song.

post.description: Add evidence link for a song. Body: link. Super admin.
Merge this song into target song. Body: targetId. Super admin.
Add alias for a song. Body: alias. Super admin.

delete.description: Delete alias by id. Super admin.

post.description: Add link for a song. Body: link. Super admin.

delete.description: Delete link by id. Super admin.

post.description: Upload evidence images (multipart, up to 10). Super admin.

put.description: Update evidence link (external links only). Body: link. Super admin.

delete.description: Delete evidence by id. Super admin.

post.description: Add artist credit. Body: artistId, role?. Super admin.

delete.description: Remove artist credit by id. Super admin.

post.description: Set suffix for all levels with this song. Body: suffix. Super admin.
Send Discord webhook announcements for passes. Body: passIds (array). Super admin.
Send Discord webhook announcements for new levels. Body: queueRowIds (array). Super admin.
Send Discord webhook announcements for rerated levels. Body: queueRowIds (array). Uses RERATE_ANNOUNCEMENT_HOOK. Super admin.
Mark passes as announced without sending webhooks. Body: passIds (array). Super admin.
Mark new-level queue rows as skipped without sending webhooks. Body: queueRowIds (array). Super admin.
Mark rerate queue rows as skipped without sending webhooks. Body: queueRowIds (array). Super admin.
Verifies Stripe-Signature using the raw request body (`express.json` verify buffer), dedupes via billing_events, fulfills TUFStellar purchases.
Upload a ZIP of translation JSON files; returns validation result (missing keys, structure).

get.description: Returns a ZIP of all English translation JSON files.
Returns available translation languages as an array of { code, display, countryCode, folder, status }.
Returns a ZIP of translation JSON files for the given language code (e.g. en, pl, kr).
Returns HTML navigation page for translation and utility tools.

post.description: Trigger external autorater for a rating (super admin)

get.description: Fetches an image from a given URL and returns it (avoids CORS). Only allows image formats.
Fetches video metadata from Bilibili API by bvid.
Redirects to the current profile image URL for a player. Use this stable link in search indexes and clients so avatar CDN URLs can change without breaking references.
Redirects to the user’s current avatar URL (always up to date; no stale disk cache).
Fetches a file from T21C-assets GitHub repo by path.

get.summary: Cached image by type and path
get.description: Serves a cached image. type: "icon" or other; path: relative path within cache.
Fetches video details (title, thumbnail, etc.) from a video URL. Supports YouTube, Bilibili, etc. Response is cached.
Generates a PNG image of a level wheel (colored segments by difficulty) using a seed for reproducible shuffle.
Returns thumbnail image for a level

post.description: Pure validation: auth gate + structural checks + reference + duplicate check. Zero side effects.
Multipart: meta JSON (form fields + optional uploadSessionId) + up to 10 evidence images. Large level zips go through /v2/upload.
Link a selected chart from a multi-chart zip to a submission.
JSON-only pass submission; no files, no multer.

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream for real-time updates (e.g. rating room user counts). Query: userId, source, isManager. Response is text/event-stream; connection stays open.
Fetches Discord user profile (username, avatar) by Discord user ID.

post.summary: Create or resume a chunked upload session
post.description: Create a new upload session for the given kind, or resume an equivalent one for this user. Filenames travel as UTF-8 JSON strings; the server NFC-normalises them. The client MUST supply a hex-encoded sha256 of the full file, which is verified at /complete.

forceNew.description: If true, discard any existing session for this user/kind/hash/size and create a new one (recovery when disk was cleared).

get.description: Returns the size + chunk limits advertised by the server for an upload kind.

post.summary: Upload one chunk of a session
post.description: Raw binary body. Index is zero-based and must be in [0, totalChunks). The chunk size must match the session's declared chunkSize (last chunk may be smaller).
Concatenates received chunks, verifies sha256 against the declared hash, and runs the kind's onAssembled hook. Idempotent.

get.description: Returns the current status, received chunks and missing chunks for resume.

delete.description: Destroys the session row and its workspace on disk. Idempotent.

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream of job progress updates for the given job ID. Same ownership rules as GET /v2/jobs/:jobId. Sends an initial snapshot if the job exists, otherwise `{"type":"waiting"}` until the first Redis update.
Returns the Redis-backed job document for the given job ID. Caller must own the job (ownerUserId set at creation).

post.description: Called by the CDN service (or other trusted workers) with header X-Job-Ingest-Key. Merges fields into the job document keyed by jobId.
Called by the CDN service with header X-Download-Ingest-Key. Increments levels.downloadCount for the single level whose fileId matches the event. Only levelzip / transform events are accepted.

get.description: Returns status of database, socket server, and basic system info
Elasticsearch-backed player search. Accepts text, `pid:playerId` (profile URL shortcut), `#discordId`, or `@discordUsername` via the `query` param. Returns a flat list sorted by relevance.

Elasticsearch-backed leaderboard. Supports sort, numeric range filters, country filter, showBanned, and text/Discord query (`pid:playerId`/`#discordId`/`@username`). Returns `maxFields` aggregations for UI filter ceilings.

Returns forward-filled rank history from append-only `player_leaderboard_rank_events`. With `from`+`to` it returns daily samples (UTC, capped by maxPoints). Without range params it returns full-history weekly samples.
Fetches the player Elasticsearch document by id and attaches freshly-computed ranks (5 parallel ES count queries).

Player profile page payload: ES document + on-demand ranks + DB-sourced passes, topScores, and potentialTopScores. `funFacts` aggregates include hidden passes only when the caller owns the profile and `showHidden=true`; `funFacts.counts.hiddenPasses` is always the real hidden-pass count for the owning caller.

patch.description: Requires an authenticated user with `playerId` set. Updates that player row only.

requestBody.description: Bio text (string or null). Empty string clears.

patch.description: Requires TUFStellar access. Saves block document and derives plaintext bio for search.

post.summary: Upload bio canvas image block asset

patch.summary: Update my player TUFStellar icon variant (v3)
patch.description: Requires an authenticated user with `playerId` set and active TUFStellar access. Body: `{ variant: "1" | "2" | "3" }`.

get.description: Paginated list of a player's passes (trimmed to just what the profile UI needs). Hidden passes are included only when the caller owns the profile and passes `showHidden=true`.
Elasticsearch-backed creator search. Accepts text, `@username`, curation count tokens (e.g. `C3>3`), and optional `facetQuery` JSON v1 (curationTypes only). Returns a flat list sorted by relevance.

Elasticsearch-backed creator leaderboard. Supports sort, numeric range filters, verificationStatus filter (single value or array), text/`@username` query, curation count tokens (e.g. `C3>3`), and optional `facetQuery` JSON v1 (curationTypes only). Returns `maxFields` aggregations for UI filter ceilings.

patch.description: Requires an authenticated user with `creatorId` set. Updates that creator row only; name must be unique among creators.

Requires `creatorId` on the user. Body: `aliases: string[]` (full replacement, max 20). Each alias must be unique vs other creators’ names and aliases (case-insensitive), and cannot match this creator’s display name.
Requires an authenticated user with `creatorId` set. Updates that creator row only.

requestBody.description: Bio text (string or null). Empty string clears.

patch.description: Requires TUFStellar access. Saves block document and derives plaintext bio for search.

post.summary: Upload creator bio canvas image block asset

patch.summary: Update my creator chart upload conditions (v3)
patch.description: Requires an authenticated user with `creatorId` set. Free-text policy for when/how charts may be uploaded.

requestBody.description: uploadConditions (string or null). Empty string clears.

patch.description: Linked creator only. Allowed values: `declined`, `conditional`, `allowed`. `pending` is not allowed (use staff workflows).

get.description: Fetches the creator Elasticsearch document by id.
Creator profile page payload: ES document + DB-sourced enriched fields (aliases, linked user, recent level ids).

patch.summary: Update creator profile header curation slots (v3)
patch.description: Owner (linked user) or HEAD_CURATOR / SUPER_ADMIN may set up to 5 curation type ids; each must appear on at least one level credited to this creator.
HEAD_CURATOR or SUPER_ADMIN. Partial body: `name`, `aliases` (full replacement), `verificationStatus` (including `pending`), `uploadConditions`. At least one field required.
Active TUFStellar subscription required. Linked creator profile only. Body: `{ variant: "1" | "2" | "3" }`.

patch.summary: Update creator profile header card surface style

post.summary: Upload creator profile header surface background image

delete.summary: Remove creator profile header surface background image

post.description: Finalize a level zip from an assembled `level-zip` upload session. Creator or super admin. Optional `uploadJobId` for GET /v2/jobs/:jobId progress.

requestBody.description: sessionId from chunked upload; optional uploadJobId (UUID) for job progress

202.description: Accepted — processing continues; poll GET /v2/jobs/:uploadJobId or SSE stream

delete.description: Remove CDN level file and clear dlLink. Creator or super admin.

post.summary: Upload level zip from URL or Steam Workshop
post.description: Super admin only. Accepts a direct http(s) archive URL (including Google Drive view links), or a Steam Workshop item URL / steam://url/CommunityFilePage/{id}. Workshop imports call steam-workshop-agent over HTTP (STEAM_WORKSHOP_AGENT_URL + STEAM_WORKSHOP_AGENT_SECRET; optional STEAM_WORKSHOP_AGENT_TIMEOUT_MS, STEAM_WORKSHOP_APP_ID). Validates the archive, uploads to CDN, and updates the level like POST /upload.

requestBody.description: Direct download URL for an archive, or a Steam Workshop filedetails / steam:// CommunityFilePage link

202.description: Accepted — CDN processing continues; poll job progress

post.description: Set target level index for a CDN level file. Creator or super admin.

requestBody.description: selectedLevel: full path or relative path string

get.description: Returns stacked purchase entitlement (expiry-driven), per-segment breakdown (`accessSegments`), optional `preview` when `previewMonths` query matches catalog terms, allowed checkout actions, and `pricingDisplay` (marketing amounts by term, currency from `CF-IPCountry` when present). Invoice IDs appear on GET /me/events only.

parameters.name: previewMonths
parameters.description: When set to an allowed term (1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12), response includes `preview.projectedExpiresAt` after stacking that many calendar months.

country.description: Cloudflare `CF-IPCountry` when sent to origin; null if absent

amountsByMonths.description: Major currency units per term length (string keys 1,2,3,6,9,12)

get.summary: Recent billing events for the current user
get.description: Returns recent BillingEvent rows (sanitized): event type, status, amount, references, optional `product` (catalog-resolved months), for disputes and clearer activity.

get.summary: Search accounts for one-time purchase recipient
get.description: Elasticsearch player search (name / username / nickname), only rows with a linked auth user; excludes you and banned/suspended accounts.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Min 2 characters after trimming unsafe LIKE chars.

post.summary: Start Stripe Checkout for a one-time TUFStellar purchase
post.description: Creates a Checkout Session (stacked calendar-month access). `recipientUserId` optional UUID (defaults to yourself). `currency` optional: `auto` (geo-inferred, default) or an allowlisted ISO 4217 code.

requestBody.description: `months` term length; optional `recipientUserId` for gifting; optional `currency` (`auto` or ISO 4217).

currency.description: `auto` (default, geo-inferred) or allowlisted ISO 4217 checkout currency

get.summary: Stripe Checkout session status for return URL polling
get.description: Retrieves the Checkout Session from Stripe (must belong to the signed-in purchaser via metadata) and reports whether the matching `checkout.session.completed` billing row has been processed. Use after `success_url` redirect instead of inferring success from GET /me alone (gifts do not extend the purchaser's access).

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: Stripe Checkout Session id (`cs_…`) from the success redirect.

get.summary: Preview Stripe refund for a checkout billing event
get.description: Returns eligibility and computed refund amounts (list-rate consumption for in-use segments). Does not mutate Stripe or the database.

post.summary: Refund a Stripe TUFStellar checkout purchase
post.description: Creates a Stripe refund (full or partial per policy). Entitlement is revoked when Stripe sends `charge.refunded`.

400.description: Not eligible / zero amount / too old

get.description: Redirect to a specified callback URL when being called from a tunneled URL
